title: docs(sdk): update README with new endpoints and examples
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Reading the friendly manual
gist.blurb: We've updated the SDK README to cover all the shiny new toys. Image editing, dedicated audio endpoints, and fresh models are now fully documented with copy-pasteable examples.
gist.summary: Updated the SDK documentation to include new endpoints for image editing, audio generation, and transcription, along with updated model defaults.
gist.impact: Developers can now easily reference up-to-date code examples for our newest API capabilities directly in the SDK repository.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot reading a large, glowing manual or spellbook (representing the README/docs). The Nomnom creature is eating an old page of docs. Code plants sprouting from the book.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, hovering over a glowing open book where literal code-plants are sprouting from the pages. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby happily eating an outdated piece of paper. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'DOCS'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
